The '''Alderaan furry moth''', also known as the '''woolly moth''', was a large-winged flying [[Insect/Legends|insect]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] that nested amid bushy [[Flower/Legends|flowers]]. The [[Larva/Legends|larvae]] of the Alderaan furry [[Moth/Legends|moth]] were armored caterpillars more than a [[Meter/Legends|meter]] long that burrowed under the ground and fed on swollen [[Tuber/Legends|tubers]]. The caterpillars lived for a dozen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before sealing themselves in cocoons and emerging transformed. In some cases, Alderaan furry moths grew to be over seven meters long.

During their childhood, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] once hid a woolly moth inside Alderaan's [[Minister of Agriculture]]'s desk drawer as a prank. The woolly moth chewed through a sheet of [[Flimsiplast/Legends|flimsiplast]] that contained Alderaan's next year budget. As punishment, [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] refused to let Leia and Winter attend a party the [[House of Organa/Legends|House of Organa]] was hosting.

They became extinct when Alderaan was [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].
